records.ety: [L., a twining, braid, fr. plectere, plexum, to twine, braid.]

defs: A network of vessels, nerves, or fibers.
The system of equations required for the complete expression of the relations which exist between a set of quantities.
A network; an intricate or interwoven combination of elements or parts in a coherent structure.
quotes: In the perception of a tree the reference to an object is circumscribed and directed by a plexus of visual and other presentations.
